content.en:
Back to the human realm.

Ye Tian was really stimulated by the words of the Wind Mountain Lord, the Domain Ancestor level was still divided into so many levels, and now he couldn't even beat an ordinary Domain Ancestor, this strength was really not something to be proud of.

For example, the Peng Ancestor he once encountered, the strength of the other party is probably far above the top domain ancestor.

After all, even the top domain ancestor may not be able to project his power to the Daoshan realm, otherwise the vast sea ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace is now an elite domain ancestor, and there is no way to locate the Daoshan realm, let alone the projection power.

However, Peng Zu can project power, and can even exert the combat power of a half-step domain ancestor, how terrifying is such a strength.

Moreover, Peng Zu casually gave him an Extreme Dao inheritance, which is a more precious inheritance than the Sacred Body Inheritance!

"The next goal is to have the combat power of an ordinary domain ancestor first!"

Ye Tian set his goal.

According to his estimates, when he stepped into the half-step domain ancestor level of the Unified Realm, he was afraid that he would be able to have the combat power of an ordinary domain ancestor, and if he used the power of the extreme path, he was afraid that he would be able to defeat the weaker domain ancestor.

If he reached the ultimate perfection level of the Unified Realm, I am afraid that he could easily kill the weaker domain ancestor.

In the following days, Ye Tian worked harder to cultivate, striving to raise his cultivation to the level of a half-step domain ancestor in the Unified Realm as soon as possible.

But if the Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor level wants to be promoted to the Unified Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor level, it is too time-consuming.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace relied on the Gate of the Stone Pupil and comprehended the infinite years in the Gate of the Stone Pupil, so that they could break through.

And if Ye Tian didn't have a real big opportunity, it was almost unrealistic to break through to the half-step domain ancestor level of the Returning One Realm in a short period of time.

And this time is calculated in hundreds of millions of years!

It's a pity that the Xuanxu Supreme Ancient Realm is only the Ancient Realm after all, and the great opportunity to be useful to a half-step domain ancestor like him is almost non-existent.

Unless you go deep into the Dark Forbidden Realm, it's hard to find a great opportunity that will be useful.

---------------

On this day 20,000 years later.

A large forbidden void realm appeared in a certain territory from the Xuan Void to the Ancient Realm, and according to the usual practice, a half-step domain ancestor entered this large forbidden void realm to snatch resources.

However, not long after entering this forbidden void realm, a great battle broke out.

And this battle attracted the attention of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Guiyi Realm, only because a very precious treasure appeared in this large forbidden void realm.

Wow!

Outside this large forbidden void realm, figures emerged one after another.

It was Ye Tian who arrived here first, and then Jinchen Daozu also came.

As for the Wind Mountain Lord, he didn't come, after all, the other party was a clone, and in order to reduce the battle, he naturally wouldn't come out.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace also came, and they also saw Ye Tian and showed a look of jealousy.

They found that Ye Tian's cultivation was no longer an ordinary half-step domain ancestor, but had reached the level of a half-step domain ancestor in the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and it was not a half-step domain ancestor level that had just entered the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

At the beginning, when Ye Tian was still at the ordinary half-step domain ancestor level, he beat them.

Now, Ye Tian is afraid that he has the ability to kill them!

So, how can they not be afraid?

Fortunately, there is still a threat from the Devouring Clan, so Black Wind Mountain will not make a move against the Heavenly Emperor Palace, otherwise they will not dare to leave the Heavenly Emperor Palace in the future.

Whoa!!!

The Four Great Realms entered this large Forbidden Void Realm, and soon shuttled to a certain place in the Forbidden Void Realm.

I saw that there was a pagoda here, a black pagoda, which was located in the center of the Forbidden Void Realm.

There was a half-step domain ancestor standing around, as well as many invincible Dao ancestors, all of whom were staring at this pagoda.

"Is this a forbidden treasure?"

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord frowned.

"It's not a forbidden treasure, its aura is far beyond the forbidden treasure!" said the Dragon Shadow Palace master.

"It's a holy thing!"

I don't know when, the Mountain Lord of Fengshan actually appeared.

Ye Tian was a little surprised, the Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain has never been willing to compete for opportunities, last time it was because the Eternal Source Stone Statue was too precious, so he snatched it.

Unexpectedly, the appearance of this pagoda made the Lord of Fengshan appear again.

"Mountain Lord, what is a holy relic?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Wind Mountain Lord's eyes also revealed a little longing, and said: "The holy relic is the existence above the forbidden supreme treasure, in fact, many forbidden supreme treasures in the Xuanxu to the ancient realm are all transformed by the projection power of the holy relic. And this pagoda is directly at the level of holy relics, which shows how precious the holy relic projected on it is, I am afraid that it can be ranked on the list of holy relics!"

"Relic list?"

Ye Tian heard an unfamiliar name again.

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain knew that Ye Tian would ask, so he explained directly: "The holy relic is a treasure that can only be born in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and there are many powerful forbidden creatures in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, as well as the Supreme Domain Ancestor, the Invincible Domain Ancestor and even the Supreme Domain Ancestor, they can ignore the horror of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and even establish a power and territory there, and that is the holy land of the Dark Forbidden Domain." It's a pity that they don't have a certain amount of strength, so they can't get into there at all, and they fall and forget about it on the way, and the list of holy relics is a list they made! However, I don't know what holy relics are on the list!"

These words, the mountain master of Fengshan Mountain transmitted the sound to Ye Tian, and the others did not know.

"Someone's in!"

Jin Chen Dao Ancestor Dao.

The one who entered was an invincible Dao Ancestor, and the other party was very bold, and he entered directly from the gate of the Black Tower, and he was not afraid of danger.

Not long after, this invincible Dao Ancestor came out.

"What's inside?"

A half-step domain ancestor asked.

This invincible Dao Ancestor didn't dare to resist these half-step domain ancestors, so he spoke up.

"What, you said there were other creatures in there?"

A half-step domain ancestor was shocked.

"Yes, I entered it and came to a large hall where there were many strong people, and then I entered a fighting platform and fought with an invincible Dao Ancestor, only to be killed by the other party in an instant. But instead of dying, I was removed. From the mouths of others, this black pagoda seems to be called the Battle Realm Tower!"

The Invincible Dao Ancestor reported.

Then, an invincible Dao Ancestor entered the Battle Armor Pagoda and gradually learned the origin of this black pagoda.

"The seventh-ranked holy relic of the Dark Forbidden Realm - the War Realm Tower!"

Ye Tian took a deep breath, and only then did he understand the preciousness of this black pagoda.

However, this black pagoda from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is not the real Battle Realm Tower, but the power projection of the War Realm Tower, which can communicate with the real Battle Realm Tower.

Of course, the strength of this Battle Realm Tower is limited, and it cannot teleport to a strong person at the Domain Ancestor level, at most, it is only allowed to enter the Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor!

Moreover, the Battlefield Tower itself consumes energy, and once it runs out, it loses its usefulness.

Immediately, the major forces decided to expend all their energy to make this battle tower incarnate operation.

This time, it was an opportunity for the major forces to be able to see the powerhouses in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm and the cultivation system.

When the news spread, the entire Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm was boiling!
